definition.name: Ezif AI Search
definition.description: AI-powered search results using smart models like GPT-5.1 and LLaMA 3.1.
definition.toolDefinition: {"name": "aiSearchEzif", "description": "Get AI-powered search results for a query", "parameters": { "type": "object", "properties": { "q": { "type": "string", "description": "The search query" } }, "required": ["q"] } }
